# Code Anchors: Bare-Name Guard

- `libs/workspace/src/bare-name.ts` — the shared bare-segment check: rejects path separators and the lone traversal tokens, imported by both the manifest and pointer sides.
- `libs/workspace/src/bare-name.spec.ts` — accepted names (including embedded dots) versus rejected separators and traversal tokens.
